subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Praise be unto God that thou hast quaffed, from the hand of bounty, the wine of everlasting life and attained unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی لله الحمد از ید عطا رحیق بقا نوشیدی و فائز شدی بانچه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
